label: About
title: About The Moss Current Index
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 16 recent saved-signal files and 12 captured links, then narrowed the page to 7 source windows around Takashi Kokubo (小久保隆) - Blessings Of The Forest (森の恵み) (199X) [Full Album] and Habitual Line Stepper, by Shatter Hands, plus 5 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became The Moss Current Index: A finished abstract expressionist plate: more than 60 percent open black-loam paper, quiet and breathable, with one dominant moss-green contour field swelling from the lower left like a living botanical current. A single disruptive ochre ink slash crosses the field diagonally, dry at its center and wet at its torn e... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 7 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against broad moss wash along lower-left contour, long ochre diagonal tear, and small circular rain-glaze pool.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
